segments.text: Customer: Good afternoon.
Travel Agent: Good afternoon.
Travel Agent: Atlanta Travel Agency, may I help you?
Customer: I saw your advert in the newspaper this morning and decided to come over for more detailed information about some trips that you currently offer.
Travel Agent: What kind of trips do you have in mind?
Customer: Well, I enjoy surfing very much and want to get tanned, but all my friends suggest either mountain climbing or biking.
Travel Agent: We currently offer all the three types.
Travel Agent: Even though biking is the most popular type of holiday, it doesn't work for everyone.
Travel Agent: I think you should follow your heart.
Customer: Right.
Customer: What are my options for accommodation then?
Travel Agent: For this type of holiday, you can choose to stay in a hotel or a self-catering apartment.
Customer: Can you introduce the hotel package first?
Travel Agent: Sure.
Travel Agent: The price for our hotel package is quite reasonable compared with that of your own reservation.
Customer: What does the price include?
Travel Agent: It covers the beachside hotel and free breakfast.
Customer: Good.
Customer: Does the hotel have any recreational facilities?
Travel Agent: Oh, rest assured.
Travel Agent: The hotel is fully equipped with a pool, a nightclub and a gym.
Travel Agent: Guests can enjoy a vibrant nightlife during their stay at the hotel.
Travel Agent: Five-star ratings are common for the hotel's satisfying service.
Customer: So how much does it cost?
Travel Agent: Well, it was originally 360 euros for an adult, but we are now offering a Labour Day promotion.
Travel Agent: You can get a discount of 12.5%.
Travel Agent: So that's ... 315 euros for now, a really good deal.
Customer: Right.
Customer: What about the self-catering apartment?
Travel Agent: Oh, that'll be even cheaper.
Travel Agent: But you have to stay in a shared room with other guests.
Travel Agent: Each room has 6 bunk beds with lockers.
Customer: OK ... I think the hotel is much better.
Customer: Getting a good night's sleep is critical for a relaxing holiday.
Customer: I can't stand sharing a room with someone who snores all night long.
Travel Agent: Can't agree more.
Customer: What about the surfing equipment rental?
Customer: I don't want to bring my own surfboard.
Travel Agent: You can hire a surfboard by the hour, day or week.
Travel Agent: Just book it in advance, and it will be delivered to the hotel or even directly to the beach.
Customer: How much does it cost?
Travel Agent: It costs 15 euros for a day.
Travel Agent: But for a week's rental, it's just 75 euros.
Travel Agent: The surf station also provides surf lessons if you're interested.
Customer: That's good to know.
Travel Agent: Oh, there's one more thing you should know.
Travel Agent: Just in case of an accident during your trip, we recommend each customer to have the correct travel cover in place before leaving home.
Customer: Please tell me about it.
Travel Agent: Well, we mainly offer two types of insurance.
Travel Agent: The first one is basic coverage.
Travel Agent: It costs 30 euros.
Customer: What does it include?
Travel Agent: It covers medical treatment during your trip and things like missing your flight, flight delays and cancellations.
Travel Agent: But you know extreme sports can be quite dangerous, and therefore injuries during these activities are excluded.
Customer: Then, how about the other one?
Travel Agent: The second one is called premier cover.
Travel Agent: It is more expensive at 42.50 euros.
Travel Agent: But we highly recommend this one for regular surfers.
Travel Agent: If you receive an injury or hurt anyone else while participating in extreme sports like surfing, you are fully covered.
Customer: I see.
Customer: I think I'll go with the premier cover.
Travel Agent: When your flight gets in, there will be a minivan to pick you up at the airport and take you to the hotel.
Travel Agent: But you'll have to get to London airport yourself.
Customer: It's alright.
Customer: I'll just take the airport shuttle.
Travel Agent: Actually, I personally suggest you take a taxi.
Travel Agent: It is much cheaper than other types of transport, including the airport shuttle.
Customer: Thanks for the tip.
Customer: I think I'll book a trip for next weekend.
Travel Agent: OK, how would you like to pay?
Customer: Do you accept credit cards?
Travel Agent: Yes, we do.
Travel Agent: But there will be a slight charge on that.
Travel Agent: If you pay by cheque, there is no extra fee.
Customer: Great.
Customer: I'll write you a cheque then ...
